prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VW EA827 2.0L 16V Turbo (APH code)** with forged internals (Mahle forged pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ARP head studs) and a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbo** (0.63 A/R, 56 trim) running 22 psi on E85, paired with a **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump** and **Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors** for 350+ hp at the wheels. Custom **ECU Master EMU Black** standalone ECU with flex-fuel mapping and launch control.

Full **02M 6-speed manual transmission** swap from a VW Golf GTI (2006+), reinforced with a **South Bend Stage 3 daily clutch** and **PPG close-ratio gear set (1st: 3.45, 2nd: 2.15, 3rd: 1.44, 4th: 1.13, 5th: 0.91, 6th: 0.78)**. **Quaife ATB differential** for improved traction, paired with a **Neuspeed short shifter (25% reduction)** for quicker shifts.

Suspension overhaul with **KW Clubsport coilovers (2-way adjustable, 300mm travel)** and **H&R 24mm front / 22mm rear sway bars** to reduce body roll. **Whiteline adjustable rear camber arms** and **SuperPro poly bushings (full kit)** for sharper handling. **Brembo 4-piston calipers (from VW Golf R32)** with **330mm slotted rotors** up front and **280mm solid rotors** in the rear, paired with **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Saveiro-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber fenders (30mm wider front, 40mm wider rear)**, **custom aluminum overfenders**, and **duckbill carbon fiber rear spoiler** for aggressive stance. **OEM+ color-matched** in **VW Candy White (L90E) with gloss black accents** on the roof, mirrors, and lower body cladding.

**Volk Racing TE37SL 17x9 +35 front / 17x10 +30 rear** wheels in **Gunmetal with gold hardware**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear)**. **Custom 3-piece aluminum wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** for flush fitment. **Hella Pagid yellow fog light delete** with **custom LED DRLs** integrated into the bumper.

**Full interior overhaul** with **Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (Saveiro-specific mounting brackets)** upholstered in **Alcantara (Stealth Black) with red stitching**, **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede)**, and **NRG quick-release hub**. **Custom roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly)** with **Sparco harness bar** and **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**. **AEM X-Series digital dash** replacing the stock cluster, with **custom carbon fiber gauge pods** for oil pressure and boost.
